name: Crab Rangoon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together cream cheese and finely chopped onion until well combined.
2. Stir in flour, paprika, and cayenne pepper until incorporated.
3. Gradually add shredded crab meat to the mixture, stirring gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Slowly add water, one tablespoon at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition until the filling reaches desired consistency.
5. Place wonton wrappers on a clean surface or tray.
6. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of filling onto each wrapper, leaving space around the edges.
7. Fold and roll up the wrappers to form small cigars, sealing any openings with water.
8. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
9. Carefully drop filled wonton wraps into boiling water, cooking for 1-2 minutes until risen to the surface.
10. Remove cooked wontons from the water using tongs or a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess moisture.
11. Allow wontons to cool completely before serving.
